query: principal engineer offer level decision candidate L

decisions.title: offer level for Candidate L — principal vs staff engineer
decisions.rationale: Two-vs-one split: hiring manager and technical interviewer recommend staff calibration given role scope; EM opposes because staff requires re-requisition beyond the approved principal headcount band. No unified recommendation; panel coordination with finance required.
options: offer at principal (approved band: $220K–$260K, no re-requisition needed)
offer at staff (requires new finance approval and delays hire)
evidence: role scope warrants staff calibration: two interviewers (Nadia, Kenji) assessed candidate L at staff on technical depth and ownership expectations
finance approved a principal headcount; converting to staff requires re-opening requisition and a new approval cycle
